name: UniFi MCP Server
description: A UniFi Network control surface exposed through MCP and A2A for local and cloud controller operations.

specialized_skills.name: read-network-state
specialized_skills.description: Read-only site, client, device, and topology queries.

specialized_skills.name: destructive-operations
specialized_skills.description: Removal, reset, and other irreversible actions.

resource_uris.name: site-manager-sites
resource_uris.description: All sites from Site Manager API

confirmation_levels.none: No confirmation required for read-only operations
confirmation_levels.required: Mutating controller state requires explicit confirmation

prompt_playbooks.name: network_diagnostics
prompt_playbooks.description: Diagnose network issues across clients, devices, topology, and WAN health.

prompt_playbooks.name: security_audit
prompt_playbooks.description: Audit security posture including firewall rules, ACLs, DPI, and port forwards.

prompt_playbooks.name: device_provisioning
prompt_playbooks.description: Adopt and configure new UniFi devices into a site.

prompt_playbooks.name: guest_wifi_setup
prompt_playbooks.description: Configure guest WiFi with vouchers, content filtering, and bandwidth limits.

prompt_playbooks.name: site_migration
prompt_playbooks.description: Migrate site settings between UniFi controllers.

prompt_playbooks.name: incident_response
prompt_playbooks.description: Respond to security incidents by blocking clients, isolating devices, and capturing logs.

integration_examples: Use health_check to verify server availability before delegating a task.
Call a read-only skill such as list_sites or list_devices to discover available scope.
For destructive skills, supply confirm=true and optional dry_run=true for preview.
Query /a2a/discover to get the skills manifest for agent-to-agent negotiation.
POST to /a2a/delegate with tool_name and params to execute a delegated operation.
Use /a2a/confirm with a confirmation_token to approve pending destructive actions.
